name: Corned Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure out 4 quarts of hot water and place it in a large container.
2. Add the coarse salt to the water, ensuring all pieces are submerged.
3. Stir in 1/4 cup of sugar until fully dissolved.
4. Sprinkle 2 tablespoons of pickling spice over the top of the meat.
5. Finally, add 1 1/2 teaspoons of saltpeter or sodium nitrate and stir gently to combine.
